config.dataMode.description: Source of game data: 'remote' (download from URL) or 'local' (read from directory).
config.forceRemoteInDev.description: When debugging the extension (F5), force remote mode instead of auto-using sibling fcdb local data.
config.remoteUrl.description: URL to the master database JSON file (used in remote mode).
config.localPath.description: Absolute path to the local FCDB distribution directory e.g., /path/to/fcdb/dist/pico8 (used in local mode).
config.language.description: Override display language. Leave empty to use VS Code's language setting.
config.pico8Path.description: Absolute path to the PICO-8 executable. On macOS you can point to the .app bundle.
